description.value: Price 10,000 gp; Slot hands; CL 1st; Weight 1 lb.; Aura faint transmutation and necromancy DESCRIPTION These black gloves glow slightly during combat. Once per day, if the wearer’s unarmed attack threatens a critical hit, the critical confirmation roll gains a +2 bonus. Regardless of whether the critical is confirmed, the attack does an additional 1d8 points of damage. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells inflict light wounds, unerring weapon; Cost 2,500 gp
